title: go-rpm-macros security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[3.6.0-7]
- Rebuild with latest Go

[3.6.0-6]
- Update CI support

[3.6.0-5]
- Add riscv64 to golang_arches for RHEL 10+
